commands.review_summary:
The branch makes `localModelLean` embedded runs apply structured Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, threads that runtime config through catalog setup, and updates focused tests and docs.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +85, Docs +2. Total +122 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR changes an experimental default rather than fixing a clearly documented broken behavior. Source inspection confirms current main only removes three heavy tools, while the PR adds Tool Search defaulting.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer approval of a compatibility-sensitive experimental default, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- Defaults `localModelLean` runs to structured Tool Search controls when `tools.toolSearch` is not explicitly configured.
- Preserves explicit operator Tool Search config, including `tools.toolSearch: false` opt-out.
- Threads the lean effective config into embedded runner Tool Search setup and documents the behavior for local model/Ollama users.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed: 3 files, 122 tests on final pushed SHA `a9b6ac4f121`.
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD` passed on final pushed SHA `a9b6ac4f121`.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts` passed on final pushed SHA `a9b6ac4f121`.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts` passed on final pushed SHA `a9b6ac4f121`.
- Live Ollama Cloud source-level stream probe with structured Tool Search control tools passed for `gemma3:12b`, `rnj-1:8b`, and `gpt-oss:20b`; each payload contained `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, `tool_call`, `think: false`, `num_ctx: 4096`, and returned `OK`.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with exit 0 before final moving-main rebases: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_839cfc1fefcb`, run `run_8b6272786459`, commit `104362e5233` rebased on `0e6937cc1be`. Later rebases to `af42e2d309c` and `a9b6ac4f121` were conflict-free and followed by the targeted/local checks above.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` passed clean: no accepted/actionable findings; overall patch-correctness score 0.84.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: local-model lean runs now compact larger tool catalogs behind structured Tool Search controls by default, reducing prompt/tool schema pressure for smaller models while preserving explicit operator config.

Real environment tested: local macOS node-wrapper Vitest/static checks; Ollama Cloud live stream probes with hosted small models; AWS Crabbox Linux c7a.8xlarge changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node --import tsx` source-level Ollama Cloud stream probe using `extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts`; AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` in run `run_8b6272786459`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`.

Evidence after fix: focused test run passed 122 tests on final pushed SHA `a9b6ac4f121`; live Ollama probes accepted the structured `tool_search` / `tool_describe` / `tool_call` surface and returned `OK`; Crabbox changed gate passed with exit 0 in `run_8b6272786459` before the final conflict-free rebases; autoreview reported no actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: lean mode injects `{ enabled: true, mode: "tools", searchDefaultLimit: 5, maxSearchLimit: 10 }` only when Tool Search is unset; explicit `tools.toolSearch` config remains untouched; hosted Ollama models accept the resulting structured control-tool surface.

What was not tested: no full end-to-end chat/channel agent turn with a live local Ollama daemon in this PR; this PR proves embedded runner config behavior, hosted Ollama structured-control compatibility, and changed-gate coverage.
target.author: vincentkoc
